---
title: "Sentiment analysis of Ecuadorian political tweets from 2021 elections"
description: |
  Sentiment analysis of replies to tweets from Ecuadorian presidential candidates in the 2021 elections using natural language processing and neural networks.
categories: 
  - 🏘️Social sciences
  - 🧠‍🕸️Deep learning
  - 💬NLP
date: "2021-09-07"
image: "../../images/nlp.png"
draft: false
---

[{{< fa brands github >}} Source code](https://github.com/sayalaruano/Sentiment-analysis-of-Ecuadorian-political-tweets-from-2021election-with-Natural-Language-Processing){.btn target=_blank}

This project was developed as a final group assignment for the Artificial Intelligence course at my bachelor, which I took as a requirement for obtaining my minor degree in Systems Engineering.

<p align="center">
  <img src="../../images/nlp.png" width="350" title="AMP">
</p>

::: {.gray-italic .center-text}
**Figure 1.-** Natural Language Processing illustration. Retrieved from [Noun Project][noun_project] and used under a CC-BY 4.0 licence.
:::

## Summary

In this project, we captured sentiments of replies to tweets from two Ecuadorian presidential candidates in the 2021 elections (@LassoGuillermo and @ecuarauz). A model of neural networks was used to classify tweets considering their sentiment as positive, negative, or neutral. The training dataset was obtained from the [Workshop on Semantic Analysis at SEPLN (TASS)][tass] of 2020, 2019, and 2012. Thus, we joined together data of the three editions in one dataset that had information about the id, text, and sentiment associated with tweets. Due to privacy policies, we cannot share the datasets here, but you can register on this [page][tass_page] to access all datasets.

The main library used to build our model was [Keras][keras] and we trained it using Google Cloud GPUs through `Google Colab`.

## Additional information

The complete information regarding model performance metrics, a jupyter notebook and python scripts of reference to reproduce our work, and further details are available on the [GitHub repository][github_repo] of this project.

[noun_project]: https://thenounproject.com/term/natural-language-processing/3261011/
[tass]: http://tass.sepln.org/
[tass_page]: http://tass.sepln.org/2020/?page_id=74
[keras]: https://keras.io/
[github_repo]: https://github.com/sayalaruano/Sentiment-analysis-of-Ecuadorian-political-tweets-from-2021election-with-Natural-Language-Processing
